isi.fileNames: Where She Used To Swim (feat. Renée)
isi.driveFileNames: OLOGI & HEIBE - Where She Used To Swim (feat. Renée).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric OLOGI & HEIBE - Where She Used To Swim (feat. Renée)

Romanization

If she swims
Swims
Swims
Only with this reverie
Imma take her to the underneath
Where she used to swim
Haze, when her breath comes easy
Shade, like a pulse in the daydream
Uh, when the moonlight kissed the sand
She would brush against my hand
In the tide, oh
Take me close right now
Hear it in the sound
Follow through the violet
I’m gonna drift where the glow be
And then I breathe slowly
If she swims, crystal eyes in the light
Keep it all down, down, girl
Swim
If she falls
Imma dive
Where she used to swim
Ah yeah, slow flame
Leave a scent all night
Oh baby
Where she used to swim
Yeah, baby she’s the ocean breeze
Imma fall back to the memory
You’re the one I dreamed in the silence, oh maybe
Into the ocean, na na
Take it on my loose tie, oh love
Yeah, come on babe, like a siren
Oh
Take me close right now
Hear it in the sound
Follow through the violet
I’m gonna drift where the glow be
(She’s always moving so quiet)
And then I breathe slowly
(That’s how I wanna come back)
If she swims, crystal eyes in the light
Keep it all down, down, girl
Swim
If she falls
Imma dive
Where she used to swim
Ah yeah
Baby where she used to swim
Ah yeah
Can we float back to the hymn
Ah yeah
Where she used to
Oh baby where she used to
Uh, oh
Into the ocean, na na
Take it on my loose tie, oh love
You’re the one I dreamed in the silence, oh maybe
Into the ocean, na na
Take it on my soft sigh, oh love
She’s the one I kissed in the daylight, oh maybe

isi.lyrics:
Lyric sus4 - Heaven (feat. eira)

Romanization

Maybe I'm the villain in your story
A girl who could have been your one and only
You say you won't forgive me
You say you want to hit me
I know you won't admit it
But you miss me
You say it's all in my head
But I know we will meet again
If not now
Then in Heaven
Maybe you're the lover in my lifetime
The boy who got away too many times
Maybe you're the one
Maybe you're my drug
Maybe we're two souls who'll fall in love
You say it's all in my head
But I know we will meet again
If not now
Then in Heaven

Hangeul

Maybe I'm the villain in your story
A girl who could have been your one and only
You say you won't forgive me
You say you want to hit me
I know you won't admit it
But you miss me
You say it's all in my head
But I know we will meet again
If not now
Then in Heaven
Maybe you're the lover in my lifetime
The boy who got away too many times
Maybe you're the one
Maybe you're my drug
Maybe we're two souls who'll fall in love
You say it's all in my head
But I know we will meet again
If not now
Then in Heaven

isi.lyrics:
Lyric sus4 - City Lights

Romanization

It’s two a.m. I’m missing you
I know I shouldn’t think about it
You say it’s not my fault
But I doubt it
When I’m lyin’ in my bed alone
I’m tryna find the light in this dark room
Tell me that you’re sorry
But you don’t move
You don’t
I can feel you right beside me
Still
I wonder where you are
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Are we drifting apart?
Can you hear me when I whisper?
I don’t wanna break your heart
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Maybe love is running thin
Every word feels like the wind
I reach for you, but you’re not near
Only silence answers here
Maybe love is just a fading sound
Like echoes we can’t turn around
I’m reaching out but you’re not there
Just memories hanging in the air
And if tomorrow feels the same
Would you still whisper my name?
Or would we fade like all the lights
That disappear into the night
I can feel you right beside me
Still
I wonder where you are
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Are we drifting apart?
Can you hear me when I whisper?
I don’t wanna break your heart
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Under city lights

Hangeul

It’s two a.m. I’m missing you
I know I shouldn’t think about it
You say it’s not my fault
But I doubt it
When I’m lyin’ in my bed alone
I’m tryna find the light in this dark room
Tell me that you’re sorry
But you don’t move
You don’t
I can feel you right beside me
Still
I wonder where you are
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Are we drifting apart?
Can you hear me when I whisper?
I don’t wanna break your heart
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Maybe love is running thin
Every word feels like the wind
I reach for you, but you’re not near
Only silence answers here
Maybe love is just a fading sound
Like echoes we can’t turn around
I’m reaching out but you’re not there
Just memories hanging in the air
And if tomorrow feels the same
Would you still whisper my name?
Or would we fade like all the lights
That disappear into the night
I can feel you right beside me
Still
I wonder where you are
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Are we drifting apart?
Can you hear me when I whisper?
I don’t wanna break your heart
Are we sleeping under city lights?
Under city lights

isi.lyrics:
Lyric NOIZ - There's nothing wrong

Romanization

You come and go like nothing
eyes are bluffin'
Talkin' like you're fine again
But i know that's a tired line
Say it's just your way, like always
Guess I’ll just wait
like you forgot what you’re doing this for

I won't let you see
That they had told you
I won't let you feel you
Can't make the line
Cause there's nothing over and over
Sober to the ground
You don't know what you got from the start

Take it easy, oh wait
Gotta love me right, cuz
We don't have no time, So
Get off the ground
Take it easy, and say
"There's nothing wrong"
Bet i know your mind
Just tell me
That you wanna be like me cuz

Nothing wrong with me
There's nothing wrong with me
Nothing wrong with me
Even if you walk away like this

Nothing wrong with me
There's nothing wrong with me
Nothing wrong with me
Even if you walk away like this

Time is tickin'

Lyric irun - J에게

Romanization

J seuchineun barame
J geudae moseup boimyeon
nan oneuldo joyonghi
geudael geuriwohane

J jinambam kkumsoge
J mannatdeon moseubeun
nae gaseumsok gipi
yeouljyeo nama inne

J nan neoreul mot ijeo
J nan neoreul saranghae

J uriga georeotdeon
J chueogui geu gireul
nan i bamdo sseulsseulhi
sseulsseulhi geotgo inne


J areumdaun yeoreumnari
meolli sarajyeotda haedo
J naui sarangeun
ajikdo byeonhameomneunde

nan i bamdo sseulsseulhi

sseulsseulhi geotgo inne

J 스치는 바람에
J 그대 모습 보이면
난 오늘도 조용히
그댈 그리워하네

J 지난밤 꿈속에
J 만났던 모습은
내 가슴속 깊이
여울져 남아 있네

J 난 너를 못 잊어
J 난 너를 사랑해

J 우리가 걸었던
J 추억의 그 길을
난 이 밤도 쓸쓸히
쓸쓸히 걷고 있네


J 아름다운 여름날이
멀리 사라졌다 해도
J 나의 사랑은
아직도 변함없는데

J 난 너를 사랑해

isi.fileNames: 미워하고 싶고 모른 척하고 싶어 (Pretend Not To)
isi.driveFileNames: Sangeun Lee - 미워하고 싶고 모른 척하고 싶어 (Pretend Not To).mp3
isi.albums: Music Flip Book Page.2 Pretend Not To
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Sangeun Lee - 미워하고 싶고 모른 척하고 싶어 (Pretend Not To)

Romanization

neol mannago nareul alge dwaetgo neol mannago nareul miwohage dwaetgo
geureoda mundeuk neo eopsi amugeotdo an doendaneun geu saenggage mani duryeowosseo

chamatdeon nummuri mollyeowasseo neo eopsi sal su eopge doen naraseo

nan ije eotteokhanayo geudae eopsi hansunggando sal su eopge doen babo gateun naraseo
hoksirado sarajil geot gata jeomjeom jagajineun naega ansseureowoseo neomu hwaga na

da joatdeon jinan uri gieok haengbokhaetdeon geuttae geu sunggane uri
hajiman ije honjaman namgyeojyeotdan i hyeonsire nummuri na jasin eomneun naya

ijeul suga eomneungga bwa wae iri apaolkka jamsido gwaenchanchiga aneun naya

nan ije eotteokhanayo geudae eopsi hansunggando sal su eopge doen babo gateun naraseo
hoksirado sarajil geot gata jeomjeom jagajineun naega ansseureowoseo neomu hwaga na

doedolligo sipeun maeume miun maeumman modu damaseo
nege jugo sipeosseonneunde geuge mamcheoreom an dwae nado neomu dapdaphae

nan ije eotteokhanayo geudae eopsi hansunggando sal su eopge doen babo gateun naraseo
hoksirado sarajil geot gata jeomjeom jagajineun naega ansseureowoseo neomu hwaga na

Hangeul

널 만나고 나를 알게 됐고 널 만나고 나를 미워하게 됐고
그러다 문득 너 없이 아무것도 안 된다는 그 생각에 많이 두려웠어

참았던 눈물이 몰려왔어 너 없이 살 수 없게 된 나라서

난 이제 어떡하나요 그대 없이 한순간도 살 수 없게 된 바보 같은 나라서
혹시라도 사라질 것 같아 점점 작아지는 내가 안쓰러워서 너무 화가 나

다 좋았던 지난 우리 기억 행복했던 그때 그 순간에 우리
하지만 이제 혼자만 남겨졌단 이 현실에 눈물이 나 자신 없는 나야

잊을 수가 없는가 봐 왜 이리 아파올까 잠시도 괜찮지가 않은 나야

난 이제 어떡하나요 그대 없이 한순간도 살 수 없게 된 바보 같은 나라서
혹시라도 사라질 것 같아 점점 작아지는 내가 안쓰러워서 너무 화가 나

되돌리고 싶은 마음에 미운 마음만 모두 담아서
네게 주고 싶었었는데 그게 맘처럼 안 돼 나도 너무 답답해

난 이제 어떡하나요 그대 없이 한순간도 살 수 없게 된 바보 같은 나라서
혹시라도 사라질 것 같아 점점 작아지는 내가 안쓰러워서 너무 화가 나

Lyric Ian Coast - Root For You (Feat. veanii)

Romanization

You let me open up my eyes
To see that trees still alive
Cause I took a step too far
I fell in myself sabotage
Trees talk
I didn't see what's going on
Stayed afloat on the river
It was what It was
Was I way too much drunk?
How can I cope without you
Between the things that you left
The memories we built burned down
I know you don't care
It's not a tregedy
Just all my fault
You're better off without me
No sympathy
Already i'm lost
I'd just root for you
One day, i thought i’m done again
We were distracted
You ain’t got intentions
But yeah, it’s just the way you love
I’d take forever to close
Oh babe, just need to swallow the words

It’s too late, i’m not strong enough to

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kwon Euibin - 이별이 오지 못하게 (WHERE GOODBYE STOPS)

Romanization

jeongmal nal saranghanayo geuraeyo geugeomyeon dwaeyo
neomu maneun geol baraeseo maeumi apannabwayo

seulpeumi uril chajado nareul tteonamyeon andwaeyo
imi sijakdoen sarangeul eotteoge bonaeyahaneunji
naneun jal moreunikkayo

ibyeori oji mothage haneure gidohalkkayo
seoroman saranghadorok idaeroman
eodido gaji mothage gipsugi sumgyeo dulkkayo
uri sarang idaeroman-

geudaereul mannagijeone nan eodie isseonneunji
geudael mannatdeon geu nal nan dasi taeeonatdeonggeojyo
geudaebakke nan mollayo

ibyeori oji mothage haneure gidohalkkayo
seoroman saranghadorok idaeroman
eodido gaji mothage gipsugi sumgyeodulkkayo
uri sarang

nunggaryeodo boinikka geudaeman bomyeon doenikka
du nuneul gamgo salkkayo geureolkkayo
geudaen ijeumyeon andwaeyo geudaeman isseumyeon dwaeyo
geureomyeon nan haengbokhaeyo -

Hangeul

정말 날 사랑하나요 그래요 그거면 돼요
너무 많은 걸 바래서 마음이 아팠나봐요

슬픔이 우릴 찾아도 나를 떠나면 안돼요
이미 시작된 사랑을 어떻게 보내야하는지
나는 잘 모르니까요

이별이 오지 못하게 하늘에 기도할까요
서로만 사랑하도록 이대로만
어디도 가지 못하게 깊숙이 숨겨 둘까요
우리 사랑 이대로만-

그대를 만나기전에 난 어디에 있었는지
그댈 만났던 그 날 난 다시 태어났던거죠
그대밖에 난 몰라요

이별이 오지 못하게 하늘에 기도할까요
서로만 사랑하도록 이대로만
어디도 가지 못하게 깊숙이 숨겨둘까요
우리 사랑

눈가려도 보이니까 그대만 보면 되니까
두 눈을 감고 살까요 그럴까요
그댄 잊으면 안돼요 그대만 있으면 돼요
그러면 난 행복해요 -
